name: Abaddon
description: The fog of war is no match for the mist of fate.

abilities.name: Withering Mist
abilities.description: Damage instances applied by Abaddon applies a dormant debuff that activates when the affected enemy unit is below the max health threshold.

abilities.name: Mist Coil
abilities.description: Damages an enemy unit or heals an allied unit, at the cost of some of Abaddon's health. Blocks the spell on impact. The self-damage on cast is always applied.

abilities.name: Aphotic Shield
abilities.description: Applies a strong dispel, and creates a barrier to absorbs a set amount of damage before expiring on the affected allied unit.

abilities.name: Curse of Avernus
abilities.description: Applies a debuff that damages over time and slows the movement speed slow of the affected enemy unit. Grants all allied units bonus attack speed upon attacking the affected enemy unit.

abilities.name: Borrowed Time
abilities.description: The most unnatural of all the gifts of the Font of Avernus, this power defies mortal understanding. What should hurt, instead heals; and what should kill gives strength anew. Applies of Abaddon's corresponding ability level when acquired.
